title: The Top 10 Movie Plot Twists and ‘The Drama.’ Plus: ‘The Super Mario Galaxy Movie’ Certainly Exists.
format: Sean Fennessey and Amanda Dobbins pan 'The Super Mario Galaxy Movie,' make the case for Kristoffer Borgli's 'The Drama,' and trade their favorite movie plot twists.

segments.heading: The Movie News
segments.note: prequels, delays, and a spring-break catch-up

films.title: Weapons
films.note: A prequel is a go, with Zach Cregger and Zach Shields writing an origin for Aunt Gladys, floated as a 1940s piece. Sean spitballs a centuries-spanning crone who feeds on children.

films.title: The Adventures of Cliff Booth
films.note: Fincher-directed, Tarantino-scripted Brad Pitt vehicle, now eyeing a fall bow (maybe Venice) over summer. Sean can't square a reported $40M salary with a Netflix release.

films.title: Backrooms
films.note: A24's late-May horror from 20-year-old Kane Parsons, with Chiwetel Ejiofor and Renate Reinsve in an infinite-rooms nightmare. Sean calls the trailer Kubrickian and feels his own mortality.

films.title: Project Hail Mary
films.note: The Gosling-in-a-helmet marketing is landing hard with small kids; Sean's son mistook the 'Galaxy' poster for it.

films.title: Ally
films.note: Bong Joon-ho's 2027 animated feature, teased with a squid-piglet creature. Sean's in on anything Bong.

segments.heading: ‘The Super Mario Galaxy Movie’
segments.note: nominated for the show's 'evil movie' designation

films.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
films.note: A narratively brutal, laser-ships-and-fan-service sequel both hosts found creatively bankrupt and Cocomelon-fast, even as it prints money. Rosalina (Brie Larson) and her sister Princess Peach are the one thread the kids latched onto. Sean's son summed it up: 'a ship that shoots lasers.'

films.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
films.note: The modest, tighter-focused first film; Sean laughed more at it.

films.title: Free Guy
films.note: A prior 'evil movie' inductee.

films.title: Fast X
films.note: The closest comp: bottom-of-the-barrel spectacle, all fast-and-explode.

films.title: How to Train Your Dragon
films.note: Cited as an early animated-fantasy-as-action movie.

films.title: Kung Fu Panda
films.note: A martial-arts movie in animated form.

films.title: The Bad Guys
films.note: A heist movie in animated form, but with real characters, unlike this.

films.title: The Lego Batman Movie
films.note: A superhero movie in animated form.

segments.heading: ‘The Drama’
segments.note: spoilers throughout; Sean warns you to turn it off

films.title: The Drama
films.note: Kristoffer Borgli's fourth feature, a doom-com with Zendaya and Robert Pattinson. A wine-tasting confession, that Emma once planned a high-school shooting she never carried out, detonates 30 minutes in and turns a wedding rom-com into a real-time moral pressure test. Both hosts loved it; it sidesteps the race and gun politics but nails the wedding-industry satire and Pattinson's bungling, still-hot everyman.

films.title: Dream Scenario
films.note: Borgli's prior film; he guested for it. Sean thinks it struggled to tie off its ending.

films.title: Sick of Myself
films.note: Borgli's dark Scandinavian comedy, working the same thesis that everyone is performing a self.

films.title: Mickey 17
films.note: Another dopey, silly Pattinson turn in the same key.

films.title: Materialists
films.note: The A24 bait-and-switch comp: sold as a rom-com, delivered something stranger. Zoë Winters had a questionable plotline in that one too.

films.title: The Sixth Sense
films.note: Amanda saw it cold at 15: Malcolm has been dead the whole time.

films.title: The Usual Suspects
films.note: Sean's keyhole into what a twist could do: Verbal Kint is Keyser Söze, sold in false flashback.

films.title: Psycho
films.note: Mrs. Bates is long dead; Norman is the killer.

films.title: Casablanca
films.note: The secret-spouse turn: Ilsa is already married to Victor Laszlo. Sean's 'Jane Eyre' template.

films.title: Planet of the Apes
films.note: The Statue of Liberty ending, spoiled for Sean by the surrounding culture.

films.title: Soylent Green
films.note: 'Soylent Green is people,' spoiled by Sean's dad.

films.title: Oldboy
films.note: Dae-su is tricked into sleeping with his own daughter. 'Park Chan-wook, what a little freak.'

films.title: Arrival
films.note: The flashbacks are flash-forwards; a devastating late reveal.

films.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
films.note: Gosling is dating Steve Carell's daughter, revealed at the backyard barbecue.

films.title: The Prestige
films.note: They're twins.

films.title: The Others
films.note: Amenábar's ghost reveal; the living are the dead ones. Slotted in beside the Kidman Hall of Fame.

films.title: Primal Fear
films.note: Aaron Stampler faked the split personality all along; Amanda argues it ruined the psychopath twist for crime fiction.

films.title: Se7en
films.note: Less a twist than a shocking revelation: what's in the box.

films.title: The Game
films.note: A Fincher pure-twist movie; the whole ordeal was staged, revealed only at the end.

films.title: Fight Club
films.note: Tyler Durden is the narrator.

films.title: Gone Girl
films.note: The mid-movie flip: Amy staged the entire disappearance.

films.title: The Crying Game
films.note: The flashpoint reveal Sean's parents argued about; he's still never seen it.

films.title: Saw
films.note: The corpse on the bathroom floor was Jigsaw the whole time; shocking out of Sundance.

films.title: The Mist
films.note: The film's added ending: the rescue arrives seconds too late.

films.title: Sleepaway Camp
films.note: The final-shot reveal of Angela.

films.title: Orphan
films.note: Esther isn't a child.

films.title: The Cabin in the Woods
films.note: The whole ordeal is an engineered ritual.

films.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane
films.note: Is Goodman's bunker paranoia or protection? Sean says check it out.

films.title: Cloverfield
films.note: The found-footage original in the anthology.

films.title: Barbarian
films.note: Spoiled for Amanda on this very show.

films.title: Malignant
films.note: Another James Wan swing: Gabriel is inside her.

films.title: Parasite
films.note: The man in the basement; the family reveal that lands about an hour in.

films.title: The Empire Strikes Back
films.note: The greatest of them: 'I am your father.' The subject of Amanda's on-air trauma after Zach spoiled it for their son to set up 'Return of the Jedi.'

films: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

Rogue One: A Star Wars Story.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story
